sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after clicking on the red target again
before = last_transition.before_frame.ascii.split('\n')
after = last_transition.after_frame.ascii.split('\n')

print("=== CHANGED ROWS (excluding row 63) ===")
for i in range(63):
    if before[i] != after[i]:
        print(f"Row {i}:")
        for j in range(64):
            if before[i][j] != after[i][j]:
                start = max(0, j-2)
                end = min(64, j+3)
                print(f"  BEFORE[{start}:{end}]: {before[i][start:end]}")
                print(f"  AFTER[{start}:{end}]:  {after[i][start:end]}")
                break

# The red object toggled back to the horizontal bar. Let me now try clicking on the blue target
# The blue cross is at rows 34-38, cols 45-54 (approximately)
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 36, 'col': 48}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
